title: Rockstar sets GTA 6 price at $80 and announces $100 Ultimate Edition
summary: The company revealed pre-order details and game editions, including additional content for the deluxe edition.

title: Valve releases SteamOS so anyone can build their own Steam Machine, acknowledges its high price
summary: The company seeks to democratize PC gaming hardware, but the cost remains a challenge.

title: Several stores refuse to sell GTA 6 due to the lack of a physical disc
summary: Retailers reject that the physical edition only contains a download code, generating controversy.

title: Rockstar confirms GTA 6 will be single-player only at launch
summary: The company clarifies that the single-player campaign will be the main focus, leaving the future of GTA Online in doubt.

title: Star Fox for Switch 2 receives positive reviews at launch
summary: Analysts highlight its solid gameplay and faithfulness to the original, although some point out that it plays it safe.

title: Shareholder fight over Elden Ring profits fails to oust Kadokawa CEO
summary: The conflict highlights the tension between FromSoftware's parent company and investors over profit distribution.

title: Marathon adds experimental PvE mode in mid-season update
summary: The Vault Breaker mode allows solo or duo players to face a new challenge with unique rewards.

title: GTA 6 will include exclusive PS5 features and near-instant loading
summary: Sony promotes the game on its console with reduced loading times and improved performance on PS5 Pro.

title: Blizzard faces criticism for Diablo 4 while detailing its next season
summary: Players express discontent, but Blizzard announces new features and a collaboration with Overwatch to calm things down.

title: Rockstar releases new GTA 6 screenshots sparking graphical debate
summary: The 63 images reveal details of the game and provoke discussions about its visual quality and continuity errors.

title: Pokémon TCG Pocket launches 'Everyday Wonders' expansion on June 29
summary: The new collection introduces everyday-themed cards that open up new gameplay strategies.

title: 007 First Light for Switch 2 shows promising development progress
summary: Those in charge assure that the James Bond game is progressing very well and is not far from completion.

title: Azure Striker Gunvolt Trilogy Enhanced will come to Switch 2 in October
summary: The enhanced edition will include graphical improvements and all content from the original trilogy, with an upgrade option.

title: Lords of the Fallen 2 delayed to early 2027
summary: CI Games postpones the sequel's launch to ensure product quality and polish the experience.

title: Vampire: The Masquerade expands its universe with new video game and D&D class
summary: The World of Darkness expands with an immersive title and a collaboration with Dungeons & Dragons.

title: Destiny 2 community reacts to the end of the game
summary: Both the Bungie team and other developers reflect on the legacy of the shooter and its impact.

title: Two Tekken announcements: Arcade Archives and a new installment for Switch 2
summary: Fans of the fighting saga receive news about classic and modern releases, including a surprise title.

title: Hideo Kojima recommends an anime and talks about his next game OD
summary: The Japanese creator shares his personal tastes and defends his innovative project against industry doubts.

title: Rockstar will not release GTA 6 trailer 3 this week, according to precedents
summary: Analysts predict that the company will follow its usual marketing pattern, delaying the release of the new trailer.

title: One Piece remake releases trailer after three-year wait and announces date
summary: Netflix's live-action version shows new scenes and confirms its launch for December 2025.
